summary: Iteration 106: Menu Item Bug Fixes and Popular Flag Auto-Derivation - All features verified. 9/9 backend tests passed, 5/5 frontend UI tests passed.

issues: Modal overlay sometimes intercepts clicks - use force=True for button clicks

critical_code_review_comments: MenuItemForm.jsx correctly uses local state for ingredients text with onBlur commit - allows typing commas/periods freely
handleImagesChange does single onChange call to avoid stale closure bug
Popular Item toggle is REMOVED from MenuItemForm - operators cannot set it
handleSaveMenuItem strips popular field before API call: const { popular, ...rest } = menuForm
Backend MenuItemCreate and MenuItemUpdate schemas do not include popular field
Backend get_restaurant_menu auto-derives popularity from order aggregation pipeline
Demo data marks top 3 highest-priced items as popular (system-derived)
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Spicy Chicken Wings menu item during UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Menu item bug fixes verified: 1) Images field persists correctly after upload, 2) Ingredients field allows commas and periods (uses local state with onBlur commit), 3) Popular toggle removed from form, 4) Backend auto-derives popular flag from order counts. Frontend required restart to clear cached version showing old Popular toggle.

bug_fix_images_field.details: Images array persists correctly when saving menu items. handleImagesChange uses single onChange call to avoid stale closure.

bug_fix_ingredients_field.details: Ingredients textarea allows typing commas and periods freely. Uses local state (ingredientsText) with onBlur commit to parse into array.

feature_popular_toggle_removed.details: Popular Item toggle is removed from MenuItemForm. Operators cannot manually set popular flag.

feature_popular_auto_derived.details: Backend auto-derives popular flag from order aggregation. Items ordered 2+ times are marked popular. Demo data marks top 3 highest-priced items as popular.

backend_api_images_ingredients.details: POST and PUT /api/restaurants/{id}/menu accept images array and ingredients array

frontend_multi_image_uploader.details: MultiImageUploader component supports up to 3 images with upload/remove functionality

management_save_strips_popular.details: handleSaveMenuItem strips popular field before API call: const { popular, ...rest } = menuForm
